what: Compare vault directory mtime against index mtime
why: Skip full rebuild if vault unchanged (~10ms vs ~120ms)

output.console: Fast path check result indicating whether rebuild is needed

success_handling.criteria: Vault directory mtime and index file mtime are successfully compared to determine if rebuild is needed

error_handling.criteria: No existing knowledge.json index file found to compare mtime against
error_handling.action: Proceed with full rebuild since there is no index to compare

event.message: No existing index found, full rebuild required

error_handling.criteria: Filesystem stat call fails for vault directory or index file
error_handling.action: Proceed with full rebuild as a safe fallback

event.message: Could not compare mtimes, falling back to full rebuild: {error}

decisions.condition: Vault mtime is newer than index mtime
Index is up to date (vault mtime <= index mtime)

decisions.decision: mtime comparison is sufficient for change detection
decisions.rationale: From KV — mtime comparison provides reliable change detection with minimal overhead, avoiding expensive content hashing
